title: rostellularia khasiana
intro: Rostellularia khasiana, a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region, is also known as Himalayan mint or khas. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms such as bloating, gas, and congestion. In herbal preparations, Rostellularia khasiana is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which may be consumed to benefit from its health-promoting properties.
